channel.title: Hutch
channel.description: Updates for Hutch — multi-tool macOS utility from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description: First public release. Window Manager (snap windows by hotkey or click, multi-display), Stash (drag-and-drop file shelf with cursor-shake summon), Browser Picker (route http(s) links by rule), Toggles (one panel for the macOS switches that hide three menus deep). Unified Permissions tab in Settings with auto-cleanup of stale Hutch.app entries on launch — Accessibility grants land on the first try. macOS 15+. Free during beta. Auto-updates via Sparkle.
